business_question: Which product categories generated the highest sales revenue?
business_context: Merchandising teams want to identify top-performing categories and prioritize assortment planning and inventory investments.
chain_of_thought: Step 1: Aggregate sales by product category.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    CATEGORY,
    SUM(NET_SALES_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
    SUM(QUANTITY_SOLD) AS UNITS_SOLD,
    ROUND(SUM(NET_SALES_AMOUNT)/NULLIF(SUM(QUANTITY_SOLD),0),2) AS AVG_SELL_PRICE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FS.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY TOTAL_REVENUE DESC;
